title: carex schottii
intro: Carex schottii, also known as Schott's sedge, is a type of flowering plant in the sedge family (Cyperaceae) that is native to North America. The medicinal properties of Carex schottii include its ability to treat respiratory issues such as bronchitis and coughs due to its expectorant and anti-inflammatory properties. The health benefits of this plant include its potential to reduce inflammation, improve respiratory function, and provide relief from cold and flu symptoms. Carex schottii can be prepared as an infusion by steeping the dried roots and rhizomes in hot water, and it can also be used as a tincture or added to salves and ointments for topical application.
